rules.description: Same file + call_type + overlapping lines = one finding
Wrapper/delegate finding and direct API call in same file
rules.note: Wrapper finding may remain if it documents a different entry point (e.g. HTTP handler)

rules.description: Dependency manifest vs runtime call site
rules.note: Use call_type agent_framework for requirements.txt / package.json; chat_completion for .create(

rules.description: After subagent fan-out, coordinator merges partial lists
